Walrus Skin Drum  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Focus: Percussion Resonance 13
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Walrus Skin Drum
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Focus: Percussion Resonance 13
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Percussion Instrument
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:10
Submitted By:Jadae Pacifica
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-22 03:07:44
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 197pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
a neriad weaver
a siren enticer
a siren sorceress


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Siren's Grotto


Uploaded June 5th, 2023 by Drewinette

# Jun 17 2008 at 1:25 PM Rating: Decent

263 posts
This also drops off of a Siren Sorceress.

drop info
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2003 at 3:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759389789
View User Forum
45 posts
Could someone post some info on where they got they drum to drop? I have been camping the sirens in front of the sirens grotto cave for a couple days now and no drums. Can you see the drum when the siren has them? I have had several horns drop and you could see the horn in their hands.
▲ Page top
RE: drop info
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 6:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966067223
View User Forum
52 posts
You can see them carrying the drum most of the time. I see the enticers carrying them while I was looking for the Runed Seashells for the coldain shawl. Good Luck on them. They do not see invis but do help each other if attacked.
▲ Page top
RE: drop info
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2003 at 7:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777059911
View User Forum
5 posts
We got about 3 or 4 of them to drop inside sirens grotto while hunting for runed sea shells for coldain shawl and ring quests. Zone in to SG, evac to opposite side of zone and head back in a bit. Swim down in the well there, and there's a bunch of swordfish, sirens, and some kind of elemental looking things, don't remember the name. Lots of Thurg armor gems drop here as well.
▲ Page top
DoT comparison!
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2003 at 4:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257400249
51 posts
Now that DoT values are shown, here is the direct comparison between a Combine Hand Drum and a Walrus Drum at lvl 40:

Tuyen's Chant: 42 per tick / 48 per tick
Fulfil's Chant: 28 per tick / 32 per tick

That makes a sweet increase of 14%!
▲ Page top
Clearation De Info
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2003 at 10:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362290018
58 posts
DotB is 55pct and does hit the selo's line (or seems to when i wield it )
Anyhow yea Main Hand instru are usually the best (Lute of the Howler, TDoK, DotB, etc.)

This drumis 30pct and is imho better than selo's if your deciding which to purchase as Selo's usually goes for up to 5k more and is only 5pct better (wow 30 sec less a fight)

Save your money, Save your time... dont stay in line. Your a bard live up to the title (or down for you anti-bards)

55th Troubadour
Melodico Harmonico
Quellious
Recruit of IH
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=539636

every bard song caps out at some point and usually a lot of instruments are a waste due to it.

Sorry my friend but you can't wield any instrument (that I know of, I have tried of lot of them) that you can wield a weapon with. I am sure these are no different, since hand drums also say they are secondary only.

RE: Slot:Secondary
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2002 at 6:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770377803
73 posts
There is a vah shir only lute that you can quest for in shar vahl thats primary only and you can wield it with a weapon. i think its the lute of the jharin recruit, cant remember the name exactly, but swinging with only your off hand isnt that effective. But its great for not having to switch out both weapons to use your lute.
▲ Page top
RE: Slot:Secondary
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 6:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758645020
32 posts
Flawless Ivory Horn from Shadeweavers is Primary allowable, which allows you to use a secondary weapon.

47 Bard 7th Hammer

▲ Page top
RE: Slot:Secondary
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 9:20 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592254675818
160 posts
Lute of the Howler, Drums of the Beast, Denon's Horn of Disaster, Velkentonors (sp) Horn of Disaster, Denon's Drums (dunno rest of name), Erjav's Flute (Again, dunno rest) are all Primary Useable, making it so you can have a weapon in offhand. All of those, though, are either super rare, or very expensive to buy. Some worth it, some aren't.

▲ Page top
Stats
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 9:15 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757314350
4 posts
Just got a Walrus Skin Drum in a trade and tested it against other instruments my wife has.

Lvl 53 Bard singing Chant of Battle (inc dex/str)

Just the song increase - 18 points
Regular Drums increase - 32 points
MM Drums increase - 37 points
Walrus Skin increase - 41 points
Selos Drum increase - 43 points

I have no idea how anyone figures the percentages for these instruments , but these are the stats.

▲ Page top
RE: Stats
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 2:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772364221
14 posts
Where would Nostrolo Tambourine fall on that list?
▲ Page top
RE: Stats
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 3:38 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773916956
View User Forum
Sage
164 posts
Drums go in this order:

Hand Drum (i.e., regular drum)
Combine Drum (sold in Katta Castellum)
Mahlin's Bongos (Part of the pg 24 top epic quest)
Mistmoore Battle Drum
Sharkskin Drum (from Kedge)
Nostrolo's Tamborine
Walrus Skin Drum (from Sirens)
Selo's Drums of the March (Naggy)
Drums of the Beast (from SG)


Edited, Tue Dec 17 17:08:46 2002
▲ Page top
stats
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 11:54 AM Rating: Default

QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 10:31 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750128870
Scholar
20 posts
Have just acquired a walrus drum I did a little testing against my tambourine. I came up with 29% added to the song, versus the 23% of the tambourine. Granted that's 6% fewer than Selo's drums but still a nice addition, never really cared about the 5 int from the tambourine anyway.

Talios Sulharai
Cazic~Thule
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 04 2001 at 2:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) All racial jokes aside, what's the deal w/ this thing? Are there really ANY bards fighting here that don't have selo's drums? Even if these are 30%, that's still 5% less than selo's drums. No stats... the only possible advantage is that these may be a little lighter than selo's. (sorry, i dun remember exactly how heavy my drums are).
This adds 30% not 27%.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 5:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Aparently Walrus skin is metallic in siren's grotto, since iksar can't use this 8P
RE: Plate drum!
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2001 at 7:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757116951
Sage
248 posts
Iksar can't be bards, also they lack the appropriate number of fingers to play most 'conventional' instruments. Typically they simply prefer to hear the agonized screams of others echoing within their city walls (plus, that 'Menudo' crap was still wildly popular until they banned it.

Also, I think it's totally unfair (woe is me!) that a fine Ogre Shaman like myself can't equip a mandolin, even though it's All/All (and the vendor won't give me a refund!). The sad thing is, my friend (an Iksar monk to boot) can equip it, and the gm's told me that if any 'fix' was made, they'd probably just remove ogres from the all/all because it'd be "too hard to code" the models. YOU SLACKERS! Quit makin' more planar-level gear and make some good JUNK for us to play with!

If anyone needs me, I'll be at the bar.
- Paghk
Shaman of Doom
MT
▲ Page top
RE: Plate drum!
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 3:54 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252295035
View User Forum
Scholar
98 posts
An Iksar may not be able to be a bard, but a bard can be an Iksar. :) It's called an Iksar Hide Mask.
